description: MCP server for local codebase indexing, semantic search, and code dependency graphs.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.giancarloerra/socraticode

environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider to use: ollama (default), openai, or google
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: API key for OpenAI embeddings (required only when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=openai)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: API key for Google embeddings (required only when EMBEDDING_PROVIDER=google)
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: URL of the Ollama server (default: auto-detected; Docker-managed or http://localhost:11434)
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_URL

environmentVariables.description: Embedding model name (defaults per provider: nomic-embed-text for ollama, text-embedding-3-small for openai, gemini-embedding-001 for google)
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Qdrant mode: managed (default, Docker-managed) or external (user-provided instance)
environmentVariables.name: QDRANT_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Full URL for remote/cloud Qdrant (e.g. https://xyz.cloud.qdrant.io:6333). Only needed when QDRANT_MODE=external
environmentVariables.name: QDRANT_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key for remote Qdrant instance. Only needed when QDRANT_MODE=external
environmentVariables.name: QDRANT_API_KEY
